# Security Company Melbourne (SCM)

> Licensed, insured and police-checked security guards and crowd controllers across Greater Melbourne, Victoria. Available 24/7 for sites and events of any size. Services include static guards, mobile patrols, event security, crowd control and commercial security.

SCM is a Melbourne-based private security provider. Every officer holds a current Victorian security licence, the business holds a Private Security Business Licence, and all guards are police-checked and insured. We cover the Melbourne CBD, all metro suburbs, plus Geelong and Dandenong.

## Services
- [Security Guards Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/security-guards-melbourne/): Licensed static, mobile, event, corporate, retail and construction guards, available 24/7.
- [Event Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/event-security-melbourne/): Licensed crowd controllers and guards for festivals, parties, weddings, corporate functions and sporting events. Includes a guards-per-100-guests ratio guide.
- [Mobile Patrol Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/mobile-patrol-security-melbourne/): Licensed guards in marked vehicles running scheduled and random patrols with GPS-verified reports and alarm response. Includes a sample GPS-verified patrol report.
- [Crowd Control Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/crowd-control-melbourne/): Licensed, RSA-certified crowd controllers for venues, pubs, festivals and events. Explains the Victorian crowd control licence, RSA requirement, de-escalation and ejection protocol, and detain powers.
- [Concierge Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/concierge-security-melbourne/): Licensed front-of-house concierge guards for apartments, corporate lobbies and hotels. Covers the security-plus-reception hybrid role, visitor management workflow, and residential vs corporate concierge.
- [Construction Site Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/construction-site-security-melbourne/): Licensed guards, GPS-verified patrols, CCTV and after-hours lock-up to stop copper and tool theft on Melbourne build sites. Covers white-card compliance and the most-targeted theft items.
- [Corporate Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/corporate-security-melbourne/): Discreet licensed guards for offices, HQ buildings and executive floors. Covers reception, access control, visitor management and the corporate-vs-commercial security distinction.
- [Retail Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/retail-security-melbourne/): Uniformed and plain-clothes loss prevention guards for stores and shopping centres. Explains loss-prevention-officer scope, uniformed vs plain-clothes, and shoplifter detain powers in Victoria.
- [Static Security Guards Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/static-security-guards-melbourne/): Licensed manned guards on fixed posts (gatehouse, reception, access control). Explains static vs mobile, armed vs unarmed in Victoria, and dated cost ranges.
- [K9 Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/k9-security-melbourne/): Licensed dog handler units for large and high-risk sites, events and patrols. Covers handler and dog licensing/welfare, K9-vs-static decision guidance, and unit cost ranges.
- [VIP Security & Close Protection Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/vip-close-protection-melbourne/): Licensed, discreet close protection officers and bodyguards for executives, public figures and events. Covers the Victorian bodyguard licence, firearms legality, the protection-detail workflow and day-rate pricing.
- [CCTV & Electronic Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/cctv-electronic-security-melbourne/): 24/7 control-room CCTV monitoring, remote/virtual guarding and AI CCTV. Explains live monitoring vs recording, the remote-guarding model, the AI detect-verify-respond workflow and tiered monitoring pricing.
- [Warehouse Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/warehouse-security-melbourne/): Industrial and logistics security with gatehouse guards, patrols, K9 and CCTV. Covers stock-theft and dock-control risks, layered defence, static-vs-patrol guidance and cost by model.
- [Healthcare & Hospital Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/healthcare-security-melbourne/): De-escalation-trained guards for hospitals, emergency departments, aged care and medical centres. Covers code-grey/duress response, vulnerable-person care, ED/ward support and cost by setting.
- [Commercial Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/commercial-security-melbourne/): Manned guarding, access control, mobile patrols, alarm response and CCTV for businesses.
- [All Security Services](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/security-services-melbourne/): Full range of guarding and electronic security services.

## Locations
- [Security Company Geelong](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/security-company-geelong/): Licensed guards and mobile patrols across Geelong and the Bellarine, covering the CBD and Malop Street, the Waterfront and GMHBA Stadium, the Corio and Norlane industrial belt, Port of Geelong and the Armstrong Creek growth corridor.

## Company
- [Service Areas](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/service-areas/): Melbourne CBD, metro suburbs, Geelong and Dandenong.
- [Licensing & Compliance](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/licensing-compliance/): Victorian security licensing, insurance and accreditation.
- [Our Process](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/our-process/): How we assess, quote, deploy and report.
- [Contact](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/contact/): Get a free security quote.
